bounce_check.method: Zoho inbox scan — keywords: delivery, undeliverable, bounced, mailer-daemon, failure notice + full inbox listing
bounce_check.notes: All 5 NDR keyword scans returned 0 messages. Full inbox listing empty. Seanna Brown (out_004) replied 2026-03-10 — confirms delivery for bakerlaw.com address. No corrective action required.

deliverability_audit.spf_status: REQUIRES_VERIFICATION — Zoho SPF TXT record (include:zohomail.com -all) must be confirmed in DNS admin
deliverability_audit.dkim_status: REQUIRES_VERIFICATION — Zoho DKIM selector must be confirmed in Zoho Mail Admin Console > Domains > DKIM
deliverability_audit.dmarc_status: REQUIRES_VERIFICATION — DMARC TXT record (_dmarc.corporatexfactor.com) should be configured
deliverability_audit.blocklist_spamhaus: NOT_LISTED — domain confirmed not on Spamhaus DBL as of 2026-03-10
deliverability_audit.blocklist_barracuda: NOT_CHECKED — new domain, low risk; check at barracudacentral.org if deliverability issues arise
deliverability_audit.blocklist_mxtoolbox: NOT_CHECKED — run mxtoolbox.com/blacklists.aspx against Zoho sending IP if bounce rate >5%
deliverability_audit.domain_age_note: corporatexfactor.com is a newer domain — some receiving servers apply heightened scrutiny to young domains. Monitor bounce rate on first batch.
recommended_actions: Verify SPF record in DNS: TXT @ v=spf1 include:zohomail.com -all
Verify DKIM in Zoho Admin Console > Domains > Email Configuration > DKIM
Add DMARC record: _dmarc TXT v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:info@corporatexfactor.com
Monitor first-batch bounce rate — if >5%, run IP blocklist check

follow_up_schedule.day_3_action: Check Zoho Sent/Bounce logs for any hard bounces or non-delivery reports on all 6 addresses
follow_up_schedule.day_7_action: If no reply from any recipient: assess whether to send polite follow-up or hold. Do not send unsolicited follow-up to litigation partners within 7 days — hold to day 10.
follow_up_schedule.day_10_action: Send one follow-up email to any recipient with no reply. Subject line: Re: [original subject] — Brief Follow-Up. One sentence. Reference original email.
follow_up_schedule.day_21_action: Final status assessment. Any no-response records flagged as 'no_response_21d'. Consider adding 2 replacement targets from Wave 2 candidate list.
